creator: freebsd@dev.thsi.be
text:
Created attachment 256257
ocaml-lablgtk2.patch

Dear maintainer of ocaml-lablgtk2,

Please provide feedback to the attached patch.
You do not need to commit it, it is or will be part of a larger submission to update OCaml: https://reviews.freebsd.org/D48228

USE_OCAML_WASH=yes should be removed as it does nothing meaningful.
Build gnomecanvas bindings.
Add GLALE_LIB_DEPENDS.
Add GTKGLAREA_USE.
Strip libraries.
Ocaml 5 compat.

Thanks in advance for your reaction,

Benjamin
